notes: v1.7.1 — NOW-TAB RAIL RESOLUTION + HUD INERT CLEANUP (gating/cleanup only, no new features). ITEM 1 — retired the RACK STATUS rail from the NOW tab (today_render): after the v1.6.99 skyline landed, the rail (a horizontal-scroll chip per rack, color-coded by state, tapping through to rack detail) duplicated what the skyline already shows — every rack's state as a bottom-up fill bar that already taps through. Recon confirmed the rail block was self-contained (no DOM ids/classes referenced anywhere else; reads only mostRecentDeploy). REPLACED with a BLOCKED STRIP: a red strip listing ONLY the blocked racks as tappable red tiles (flex-wrap, min-height var(--tap-m)), rendered ONLY when racksBlocked > 0 — surfacing blockers twice (skyline red-cap bars + this named strip) is the one redundancy worth keeping. The strip reads the SAME rollup.rackRollups the skyline uses (filter rr.rollup.isBlocked) — no re-load of racks/phases, no parallel math, so the two can never disagree (the v1.6.95 coherence rule). The rail/tiles elsewhere (deployment-detail floor map) are untouched. ITEM 2 — swept the two inert leftovers the v1.6.99 HUD ship flagged: removed `function _floorMap_calcCols` (recon: 0 callers after the floor-map tile rewrite) and the unused `var dep = deploy_getById(deployId)` at the top of deploy_renderFloorMap (recon: referenced nowhere else in the function). Pure dead-code removal, no behavior change. Method: recon workflow (4 parallel read-only probes confirmed rail-has-no-external-refs, calcCols-orphaned, dep-unused, skyline-state-model) → inline edits → adversarial review workflow on the diff. VERIFIED: node --check 2/2 inline scripts + sw.js, version.json valid, block-0 braces UNCHANGED at 2565 (no CSS this ship — the strip + removals are JS only), three stamps v1.7.1. Built in Claude Code on 4797997 (v1.7.0) per the one-builder rule; web-Claude post-merge parity review pending (note: web-Claude is still behind from v1.6.96 — see PHANTOM-SYNC-v1.6.96-to-v1.7.0.md). Operator walkthrough pending: NOW tab with no blockers shows skyline + no rail; with >=1 blocked rack shows the red BLOCKED strip naming them; tap a blocked tile → rack detail; floor map unchanged.
